zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III於大約1386年出生在英國越可爾卡爾頓時，他的父親Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II32歲，母親Elizabeth Aldeburgh25歲。他和Agnes Goddard至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1417年10月13日在法國諾門迪享年32歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III于大约1386年出生在英国越可爾卡爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II32岁，母亲Elizabeth Aldeburgh25岁。他和Agnes Goddard至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1417年10月13日在法国諾門迪享年32岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Brian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III was born about 1386, in Carlton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Aldeburgh, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Agnes Goddard. He died on 13 October 1417, in Normandy, France, at the age of 32, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III est né environ 1386, à Carlton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Aldeburgh, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Agnes Goddard. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1417, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III um 1386 in Carlton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Aldeburgh 25. Er hatte mit Agnes Goddard mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1417 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III è nato il circa 1386 nel Carlton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Aldeburgh, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Agnes Goddard. Morì il 13 ottobre 1417, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton IIIが約1386年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカールトンで生まれた時，父Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton IIは32歳，母Elizabeth Aldeburghは25歳であった。彼はAgnes Goddardとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1417年10月13日にフランスノーマンディで32歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III(이)가 대략 1386년 영국 요르크실르 칼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Aldeburgh(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Agnes Goddard(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 10월 13일 프랑스 노먼디에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Carlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Aldeburgh, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Agnes Goddard. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1417, em Normandie, França, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III родился около 1386 г. в местности карлтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Aldeburgh, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Agnes Goddard. Он умер 13 октября 1417 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III nació aproximadamente 1386, en Carlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Aldeburgh, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Agnes Goddard. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1417, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
